user.title: Environment Engine
user.description: Add the shared Global entry once (outdoor & energy sensors), then add a Room per area.

global.title: Global (shared) sensors
global.description: Outdoor and energy sensors shared by every room — configure once. All optional.

data_description.weather_entity: Outdoor temperature for solar load and passive-ventilation checks.
data_description.forecast_high_sensor: Used to pre-cool ahead of the heat while power is cheap.
data_description.outdoor_aqi_sensor: Outdoor AQI or PM sensor (e.g. a Sensor.Community PM10). Above the seal threshold, rooms seal and purify. Set the threshold to match your sensor's scale.
data_description.price_entity: Current spot price. Drives eco easing when power is expensive.
data_description.lightning_distance_sensor: Point at any Blitzortung lightning sensor to enable lightning safety. The engine then reads the individual geo_location strikes (distance, count, recency) to decide holds — set it only if Blitzortung is installed.
data_description.price_forecast_sensor: A sensor carrying the upcoming price curve (e.g. Elpriset's '…_forecast' sensor, or a Nordpool sensor). Enables percentile-based expensiveness and cheapest-window pre-cooling. Without it, the engine uses the current price vs the daily average.

room.title: Add a room
room.description: Pick the area to auto-discover its devices (optional).

entities.title: Room devices & sensors
entities.description: Everything is optional and grouped below — expand a section to add what this room has. Outdoor & energy sensors live in the Global entry. Add at least one device.

data_description.name: Names this room's device and entities (e.g. Bedroom).

data_description.climate_entity: The climate device this room drives (cool, dry, fan).
data_description.temperature_sensor: Drives cooling; falls back to the AC's own reading if empty.
data_description.fan_entity: Circulation, air-quality assist, mould, or a gentle comfort breeze.
data_description.blinds_cover: Closed against solar heat and glare; reopened once it clears.
data_description.lux_sensor: Shades against bright sun; enables dark-room sleep mode.

data_description.aqi_sensor: Preferred indoor air-quality input; drives the purifier.
data_description.pm25_sensor: Your indoor fine-particle sensor (PM1 or PM2.5 — same 'fine' category). High indoors with clean outdoors = an indoor event: purify and air out.
data_description.pm10_sensor: Optional indoor coarse-particle sensor (dust/pollen). Leave empty if your PM10 sensor is outdoors — that goes in the Global outdoor slot.
data_description.purifier_entity: Runs and sets speed from air quality (fan or switch).
data_description.ionizer_entity: Auxiliary; engages only on a strong pollutant surge.
data_description.ventilation_entity: Fresh-air fan, ERV, vent, or window opener. Runs on high CO2; off during outdoor events.
data_description.co2_sensor: Drives fresh-air ventilation and (without AQI) air-quality pressure.
data_description.voc_sensor: Air quality when no AQI sensor is set.

data_description.humidity_sensor: Enables mould prevention, dry/dehumidify, muggy-cooling, and the dew-point guard.
data_description.humidifier_entity: Driven by humidity and mould; a dehumidifier frees the AC to cool.

data_description.occupancy_entity: When away, the room idles instead of conditioning empty space.
data_description.window_entity: An open window pauses active cooling and favours passive ventilation.
data_description.smoke_sensor: Safety: stops active devices when smoke is detected.
data_description.outlet_overload_sensor: Safety: backs off when the circuit is overloaded.
data_description.vent_entity: The contact sensor on the specific window/vent the portable AC's exhaust hose goes through. Only this (or the manual 'Exhaust Vented' switch) allows a portable unit to cool — a general door or window sensor won't, since an open door doesn't vent the hose.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure
reconfigure.description: Add, change, or clear entities. Clearing a field disables that capability.

abort.single_global: A Global entry already exists — only one is allowed. Reconfigure it instead.

error.no_entities: Add at least one device or sensor for this room.

init.title: Environment Engine options
init.description: Room comfort settings. (Energy & outdoor thresholds live on the Global entry.)

data.co2_ventilate: CO₂ level to bring in fresh air

data_description.auto_apply: When off, the engine shows what it would do without touching any device.
data_description.target_temperature: Your one comfortable temperature; the engine adapts the real setpoint.
data_description.min_change_interval: Anti-flapping: how long a device holds before it may change again.
data_description.compressor_min_cycle: Protects the AC: the compressor won't switch on/off more often than this. 0 disables.
data_description.co2_ventilate: CO2 at/above which the ventilation device brings in fresh air.
data_description.sleep_lux: When dark (at/below this) and the sun is down, ease more and keep devices quiet. 0 disables.
data_description.humidity_comfort: Above this humidity, a warm room is treated as muggy.
data_description.humidity_cooling: How many °C humid air may add to the perceived ('feels-like') temperature, so a muggy room is cooled like a warmer one. 0 disables (use dry-bulb temperature only).
data_description.dewpoint_margin: The AC won't cool below the room's dew point plus this margin. 0 disables.
data_description.price_high: Only used when no average sensor is set: the price at/above which power is expensive.
data_description.outdoor_aqi_threshold: Outdoor air quality at/above which rooms seal and purify hard.
data_description.pm25_threshold: PM2.5 (µg/m³) at/above which fine particles count as elevated.
data_description.pm10_threshold: PM10 (µg/m³) at/above which coarse particles count as elevated.
data_description.lightning_distance: Ignore strikes farther than this. Within it, closeness and strike frequency decide how long the hold lasts.
data_description.air_recovery: After an air-quality spike (cooking, smoke), keep the purifier elevated while it decays back to baseline over roughly this half-life. 0 = react to the live reading only.
data_description.presence_hold: Stay 'occupied' for about this long after the last detection, so sitting still doesn't flip the room to away. 0 = react instantly.
data_description.filter_life: Flag 'Filter Due' once the purifier has run this many hours. 0 disables the reminder.
data_description.portable_ac: Mark this if the AC is a portable unit with an exhaust hose. Cooling then runs only when the exhaust is vented (the window/vent sensor is open, or the manual 'Exhaust Vented' switch is on); otherwise it falls back to fan-only. Leave off for split/installed units.
data_description.vent_revert: The manual 'Exhaust Vented' switch turns itself back off after this long, so a forgotten toggle can't vent hot air indefinitely. 0 = never auto-revert.
data_description.pricing_mode: Spot: shift cooling toward cheap hours and ease off when expensive. Fixed: flat-rate contract — ignore price entirely and optimise for comfort.
data_description.device_min_cycle: Wear protection: once the fan or purifier starts or stops, keep it that way for at least this long, to avoid rapid start/stop cycling. 0 disables (the AC compressor has its own separate protection).
data_description.quiet_hours: During quiet hours the engine keeps the compressor off and moves air instead (the AC's fan-only mode, plus any fan), so a bedroom stays quiet at night. It still cools if the room gets too hot — see below.
data_description.quiet_start: When the quiet window begins (it may run past midnight).
data_description.quiet_max_temp: Comfort override: if the room (feels-like) reaches this temperature during quiet hours, the compressor runs anyway rather than let you cook. Set high to keep quiet hours strict.
data_description.ionizer_mode: When the ionizer runs. 'With the purifier' turns it on whenever the purifier runs; 'Only on heavy pollution' saves it for a strong surge; 'Never' leaves it off.
